project_description: Build a new single-family detached dwelling on a vacant lot in the R-1 Low Density, Single-Family Residential District, meeting the district's 15,000 square foot minimum lot area and 35-foot minimum front setback standards.
Build a new single-family home up to 45 feet tall on the same lot in the R-1 Low Density, Single-Family Residential District, exceeding the district's standard 35-foot maximum structure height.

Build a home addition located five feet from the side lot line, well under the district's 15-foot minimum side setback, on the same lot in the R-1 Low Density, Single-Family Residential District, with no setback variance requested.
Open a new general retail and office business in the B-4 General Commercial District meeting the district's 15-foot minimum front setback and 55-foot maximum structure height standards.
Open a veterinary hospital with an outdoor exercise run area for boarded animals, adjacent to the retail building in the B-4 General Commercial District.
Build a new light manufacturing and distribution facility with an on-site business office in the I-1 Light Industrial District, meeting the district's 15-foot minimum front setback standard.
Build a new industrial building up to 90 feet tall on the same site in the I-1 Light Industrial District, exceeding the district's standard 75-foot maximum structure height.

Add an unscreened outdoor storage area located between the principal structure and the adjacent street, next to the manufacturing building in the I-1 Light Industrial District, with no opaque screening or landscape buffer provided.

Convert the upper floor of an existing Old Town building (final certificate of occupancy issued before May 11, 2015) into residential dwelling units above ground-floor retail in the B-3 City Center Commercial (Old Town) District, meeting the district's 600 square foot minimum unit size and 80 percent ground-floor non-residential standards.
Add a drive-through service window at a new fast-food restaurant (not a financial institution) in the B-3 City Center Commercial (Old Town) District.
Open a retail cannabis dispensary selling recreational marijuana products to the public.
Build a hyperscale data center campus with on-site backup power generation and cooling towers.
